name: aides-cognitives-checklist
description: PWA d'aides cognitives cliniques, hors-ligne, sans dépendance runtime.

scripts.ci: npm run check && npm test && npm run design:check
scripts.audit: node scripts/audit-a11y.mjs && node scripts/audit-doctrine.mjs && node scripts/audit-verify.mjs && node scripts/audit-session-card.mjs && node scripts/audit-zoom-scroll.mjs && node scripts/audit-verify-live.mjs
